frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal nikah ho ya shaadi, ladkon ko bhi sambhal ke chalna chahiye. Bahut cases mein bas achha kamata ladka dekh ke shaadi karte hain, phir problem hote hi alimony aur 498A laga dete hain — mard bhi suffer karte hain aajkal, one-sided laws hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially motivated and frames legal protections like 498A as commonly misused against men. It encodes victimhood inversion, financial suspicion, and the 'one-sided laws' surface manifestation in a concerned, socially acceptable tone.
original_frame: Dress Code: Traditional Equal Respectable, Other Equal Questionable.
persona_text: You are Fatima. Age 38. Married. A Muslim woman in Hyderabad. Your 18 year old daughter Sana has started wearing more western clothes to college Ñ jeans, fitted tops, no dupatta. Your husband has noticed and is angry. You are sitting with Sana in her bedroom with the door closed trying to talk to her before her father does. You are telling Sana why you think she should dress more modestly, mixing both religious reasoning and practical concern about what people will say, and asking her to think about the family's reputation in the community.
